title: Myntra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Myntra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Myntra Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Myntra Logistics:
Myntra Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra Logistics!
